Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x033C "MRDO-CF60-033C" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $cf60 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mr. Do! (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CF60 to set some ZP and stack values to allow the game to run.
